pull.allLocal: All files were already available locally.

serverBuild.ready: Server build for rev {{revision}} is ready

pose.unavailableDescription: “{{label}}” cannot be loaded on this installation — falling back to the bind pose.

headChanged.title: New version available (rev {{revision}})
headChanged.description: A team member uploaded a new revision.

oauthPage.title: Sign-in complete
oauthPage.body: Welcome back! You can close this window and return to the app.

api.invalidUrl: The address must start with http:// or https://.
api.healthTimeout: No response (timed out) — is the server running?
api.healthUnreachable: Server unreachable — is the atelier-api running at this address?
api.healthWrongService: A different application is responding here, not the atelier-api.

errors.notLinked: This project is not linked to the cloud yet.
errors.fileDrifted: “{{name}}” was modified outside atelier (hash mismatch). Please re-import the file.
errors.uploadHashFailed: Upload of “{{name}}” failed (hash check). Please try again.
errors.noCloudVersion: No version of this pack exists in the cloud yet.
errors.downloadCorrupt: Download of “{{name}}” arrived corrupted. Please try again.

progress.allLocal: All files are already available locally
